product_overview: Mobile-first TOEFL R/C micro-practice app that generates dense 150–200 word passages and high-difficulty inference questions using generative AI, with on-demand AI tutoring and mistake analysis to accelerate targeted improvement.
core_goals: Deliver bite-sized, high-density TOEFL reading practice optimized for 10-minute mobile sessions.
Use AI to generate or reuse validated questions to minimize latency and cost while maintaining high-quality difficulty.
Provide on-demand AI explanations (persona-driven) that diagnose why a user was trapped by a distractor and give actionable advice including speed feedback.
Track performance, persist results, and produce AI-driven summaries of recent mistakes to guide focused review.

features.name: Problem Generation (Daily Bite)
features.description: Generate or fetch a dense 150–200 word passage and a high-difficulty inference question (reused when available) and present a timed solving experience.
user_flows: Open app -> Tap 'Daily Bite' -> POST /api/generate-bite with topic='Biology' -> Receive generated passage + question + options -> See 90s timer appear and start -> Read passage -> Select an answer option -> Click Submit -> POST /api/save-result with userId, questionId, userAnswer, isCorrect, timeSpent -> See immediate correctness feedback and answer rationale

Open app -> Tap 'Daily Bite' -> POST /api/generate-bite with topic='History' -> API responds with reused=true and shows '🔥 1,200명이 푼 검증된 문제' badge -> See 90s timer appear -> Let timer reach 0 -> Automatic submit triggered -> POST /api/save-result with isCorrect=false, isTimeout=true -> See 'Time Out' feedback and option to view explanation

Open app -> Tap 'Daily Bite' -> POST /api/generate-bite with topic='Physics' -> API returns 5xx or network error -> See error toast '문제를 불러오지 못했습니다' and Retry button -> Tap Retry -> POST /api/generate-bite again

features.name: AI Tutoring (1:1 Explanation)
features.description: Persona-driven AI explanations in a bottom sheet that analyze why the user was misled, show evidence in the passage, and give speed/strategy feedback.
user_flows: Answer question and get it wrong -> Tap 'View Explanation' -> Bottom sheet opens -> Select persona '츤데레 일타강사' -> Type message describing doubt (e.g., '왜 B가 정답이 아닌가요?') -> POST /api/chat-tutor with message and question_context -> Receive AI explanation with cited signals from passage and pacing advice -> See option to apply tips on next bite

Answer question -> Tap 'Ask Tutor' without typing a message -> Click Send -> Client validation shows inline error '메시지를 입력하세요' -> User types message and retries -> POST /api/chat-tutor -> Receive explanation
Tap 'Ask Tutor' -> Check credit balance (client) -> If credits < 1 show '충전 필요' modal with Add Credits CTA -> User cancels -> Close tutor bottom sheet

features.name: Progress Tracking & Save Results
features.description: Persist each attempt (answer, correctness, time spent) and provide AI analysis of recent mistakes to identify patterns and recommend focused review.
user_flows: Complete several bites -> After each submit POST /api/save-result with userId, questionId, userAnswer, isCorrect, timeSpent -> Server stores BiteResult entries -> User navigates to 'Review' -> POST /api/get-summary with userId -> Receive AI analysis summarizing last 5 wrong answers and top-3 weak topics -> See list of wrong questions and 'Retry' buttons (no credit deduction) -> Tap 'Retry' on an item -> POST /api/generate-bite with the same questionId/topic -> Retry question is presented
Complete a bite -> POST /api/save-result fails (network) -> Show inline error '결과 저장 실패' with Retry button -> Tap Retry -> POST /api/save-result succeeds
Open 'Review' -> POST /api/get-summary with userId -> API returns empty or no recent mistakes -> See message '최근 틀린 문제가 없습니다. 더 많은 문제를 풀어보세요' and CTA 'Daily Bite로 돌아가기'

features.name: Settings & Credits Management
features.description: User can configure tutor persona and timer behavior; credits are consumed per new/reuse generation and per chat explanation according to the business rules in the product spec.
user_flows: Open Settings -> Toggle 'Timer Mode' Off -> App saves setting locally -> Start next bite -> 90s timer does not display
Open Settings -> Open 'Tutor Persona' -> Select '친절한 과외쌤' -> App saves persona preference -> Next time user opens AI Tutoring the selected persona is preselected

Attempt to generate a new bite -> POST /api/generate-bite triggered -> Client checks local credit_balance before request -> If credits < 5 show modal '크레딧이 부족합니다' with CTA '크레딧 충전' -> User taps '취소' -> Generation aborted
Tap 'Ask Tutor' -> Client checks local credit_balance -> If credits >=1 allow POST /api/chat-tutor -> On successful response deduct 1 credit locally and show updated balance

apis.description: Generate a new TOEFL problem or fetch a reused one.
Chat with AI Tutor about a specific question.
Save user's answer and time spent.
Get AI analysis of recent mistakes.

features.name: Problem Generation
features.description: AI-powered TOEFL reading passage and question generation.

features.name: AI Tutoring
features.description: Interactive tutoring based on specific questions and user persona.

features.name: Progress Tracking
features.description: Saving and analyzing user performance data.
